title: Toasty's Glamourous Glowberries (3d glowberries)
description: Makes glowberries 3d. Puts the "Lush" in "Lush caves"
body:
Changes glowberries/cave vines to be 3d.

puts the "lush" in "lush caves"

Modeled and textured by me in blockbench.

might add emissiveness in the future

Inspired by the "Cave Vines 16x" texture pack by LexLim on Planet Minecraft
